name: AURA
notes: Owner publish workflow, private change review, interactive admin dashboard, and corrected collection tags

highlights.title: Owner build review
highlights.detail: Admin can inspect the prepared 1.0.2 build before public release.

highlights.title: Manual publish control
highlights.detail: Publishing stays behind the owner dashboard and Cloudflare deploy hook.

highlights.title: Private change watch
highlights.detail: Owner-only release events remain hidden from public listeners.

highlights.title: Interactive operations cards
highlights.detail: Dashboard cards open catalog, release, trust, account, and audit details.

highlights.title: Collection cleanup
highlights.detail: Vibe And Bubble is Afrobeats only; Blues is tagged separately and Highlife is waiting for a true Highlife track.
